caption: A news report features a group of men gathered indoors, primarily dressed in white traditional Indian attire. A man in a light blue shirt is seen speaking and gesturing toward another man in a white shirt, while several other men stand behind them. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo appears in the top right of each frame. Red and yellow graphic banners overlay the footage with Hindi text. The top frames display the headline "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "BJP से डॉ. प्रे", while the bottom frames show "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेज" and "BJP से डॉ. प्रेम कुमार नीतीश सरकार में मंत्री बने". The names "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "विजेंद्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार" are also visible on screen. Across the sequence, the camera angle remains static, capturing the same interaction, while the on-screen text and news banners change. A digital clock in the bottom right indicates the time as "10:03 PM".
